responses.body:
[
  {
    "id": "1",
    "name": "Bench Press",
    "muscleGroup": "Chest",
    "equipment": "Barbell",
    "instructions": "Lie on a flat bench. Lower the barbell to mid-chest. Press back up until arms are fully extended."
  },
  {
    "id": "2",
    "name": "Squat",
    "muscleGroup": "Legs",
    "equipment": "Barbell",
    "instructions": "Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your hips as if sitting in a chair. Push back up to the starting position."
  },
  {
    "id": "3",
    "name": "Deadlift",
    "muscleGroup": "Back",
    "equipment": "Barbell",
    "instructions": "Stand with mid-foot under the bar. Hinge at hips to grab the bar. Drive through the floor to stand up straight."
  },
  {
    "id": "4",
    "name": "Shoulder Press",
    "muscleGroup": "Shoulders",
    "equipment": "Dumbbells",
    "instructions": "Sit on a bench with back support. Press dumbbells overhead until arms are extended. Lower slowly."
  },
  {
    "id": "5",
    "name": "Pull-up",
    "muscleGroup": "Back",
    "equipment": "Bodyweight",
    "instructions": "Hang from a pull-up bar with overhand grip. Pull your body up until your chin clears the bar."
  },
  {
    "id": "6",
    "name": "Bicep Curl",
    "muscleGroup": "Arms",
    "equipment": "Dumbbells",
    "instructions": "Stand holding dumbbells. Curl weights toward shoulders while keeping elbows stationary."
  },
  {
    "id": "7",
    "name": "Leg Press",
    "muscleGroup": "Legs",
    "equipment": "Machine",
    "instructions": "Sit on machine with feet on platform. Push weight up until legs are extended. Lower slowly."
  },
  {
    "id": "8",
    "name": "Plank",
    "muscleGroup": "Core",
    "equipment": "Bodyweight",
    "instructions": "Hold a push-up position with forearms on the floor. Keep body in a straight line from head to heels."
  }
]
